patch.value: GH-638: delete JSON envelope reports the removed item as open

Make the delete mutation result unambiguous for agents by replacing the pre-delete lifecycle status with an explicit deletion outcome or documented dedicated field across CLI, SDK, and MCP projections.

pm delete JSON/SDK/MCP results cannot be interpreted as the deleted item remaining active; the compact mutation envelope stays backward-aware and token-efficient; focused contract and runtime tests cover deletion plus non-delete parity.

value.author: codex-root-20260722
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence 2026-07-22: searched all statuses for GH-638, delete JSON status, deleted mutation result, and misleading open status. No exact item exists. Reused closed lean-mutation parent pm-nilh and related compact JSON/atomic mutation lineage pm-cfed and pm-xm7c. This item remains open/unclaimed because it is documented GitHub intake, outside the active context-index bundle.
